title: vatica elliptica
intro: Vatica elliptica, also known as the Borneo ironwood or Borneo beech, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dipterocarpaceae, native to the island of Borneo. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Vatica elliptica include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. Vatica elliptica is often prepared as a herbal tea or tonic, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine, particularly in Malaysian and Indonesian folk medicine.
